channel.title: Zero Day Initiative — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Zero Day Initiative (zdi).

item.title: CVE-2026-3691 · 5.3 MEDIUM — OpenClaw Client PKCE Verifier Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: OpenClaw Client PKCE Verifier Information Disclosure Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to disclose stored credentials on affected installations of OpenClaw. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that th…

item.title: CVE-2026-3690 · 7.4 HIGH — OpenClaw Canvas Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: OpenClaw Canvas Authentication Bypass Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations of OpenClaw. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability. The specific flaw exists wit…

item.title: CVE-2026-3689 · 6.5 MEDIUM — OpenClaw Canvas Path Traversal Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: OpenClaw Canvas Path Traversal Information Disclosure Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to disclose sensitive information on affected installations of OpenClaw. Authentication is required to exploit this vulnerability. The spe…

item.title: CVE-2026-4158 · 7.3 HIGH — KeePassXC OpenSSL Configuration Uncontrolled Search Path Element Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: KeePassXC OpenSSL Configuration Uncontrolled Search Path Element Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of KeePassXC. An attacker must first obtain the abil…

item.title: CVE-2026-4157 · 7.5 HIGH — ChargePoint Home Flex revssh Service Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: ChargePoint Home Flex revssh Service Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows network-adjacent attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of ChargePoint Home Flex devices. Authentication is n…

item.title: CVE-2026-4156 · 7.5 HIGH — ChargePoint Home Flex OCPP getpreq Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: ChargePoint Home Flex OCPP getpreq Stack-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows network-adjacent attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of ChargePoint Home Flex EV chargers. Authent…
